label: persistent_cognitive_loop_milestone
summary: Persistent cognitive loop is active and completing repeated cycles. The main reinforced auto-mutation anchor remains dominant while the system plans, executes, tracks outcomes, reinforces, decays, and archives low-impact paths.
current_capability: system now runs repeated cognitive cycles over time, reinforcing proven behavior compounds and decaying weaker paths
watch_item: active_build_executor_feedback compounds are beginning to receive reinforcement; next fix should separate report compounds from true behavior-bearing compounds
